titleStmt.title: SII 11.150: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 150. (B.K. No. 5 of 1926-27.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE PRĀKĀRA WALL OF THE TRIKŪṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the regin of Tribhuvanamalladēva and registers the gift of some cesses made to the god Sōmanātha (in the temple) of Svayaṁbhū Trikūṭēśvaradēva of Gaḻdugu, an agrahāra in Beḷvala-nāḍu, by Mahāpradhāna Achchupannāyadadhishṭhāyaka Daṇḍanāyaka Mādhava-Bhaṭṭa, a subordinate of Mahāpradhāna Bhīvaṇayya, who was governing Palasige Twelve-Thousand (province). and was in charge of the achchu-pannāya revenue of the Seven-and-a-half-lakh (country). Bhīvaṇayya is stated to be the chief of the Sāvāsis (Sāvāsigaḷ-adhishṭhāyaka). The grant was made after washing the feet of Kriyāśakti-Paṇḍita, āchārya of the maṭha attached to the temple. The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 27, Chitrabhānu, Chaitra, śu. 1, Sunday. The date seems to be irregular. If śu. is a mistake for ba. the equivalent would be A.D. 1102, April 6, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbha vē . śrīmaccāḷukyavaṁśāṁbujavanadinapaṁ
gabhāgaprakharabhujabaḷaṁ tarppitā sphaṭika
labhūpāḷakanahitakarivyūhasaṁdōhasiṁha . Ānṛpanakutabhaya lōbha daṁ hitajigīṣu
tyāśrayanaṁtā nṛpatisutaṁ vikramabhūnāthaṁ tatpriyānujaṁ jayasiṁhanṛpana tanayaṁ nayavinayōpētanahitakuḷakuḷanagadurjjaya
vajraṁ jayalakṣmīdayitaṁ traiḷōkyamalla nāhavamalla . Abhinutavikramābharaṇanāhava mallanṛpaṁge gōminīnibheyena saṁda pe
bācaladēvige puṭṭidarssutarvvibhu bhuvanaikamallanṛpanuṁ ripurāyajhaḷappanunnataṁ tribhuvanamallabhū
bhujanu mujvaḷakīrtti nūḷaṁbabhūpanuṁ . Eseda navaroḷage neṟe tannṛparagidugidāḷvesageyye .
vīrarājyāvasuṁdhareyanalke vikramāditya nṛpa [.] vaṁga turuṣka cēramāgadha māḷava kēraḷakīra pāriyātrāṁga va
rāḷa cōḷa khaśa gūrjjara koṁkaṇika gauḍa kāḷiṁga surāṣṭra pāṇḍya maḷayāḷa vanipāḷajāḷa muttuṁgavi kra
manaṁ sugidāḷvesageyvudu vikramāṁkana . Elliyumi jagado ḷma lla tānenuta jayalakṣmīvallabha
nenisal tribhuvanamallaṁ khiḷa bhūmaṇḍaḷamaṁ . svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalla dēvara vijeyarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi
pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . dhuradoḷtāne dhuraṁdharaṁ samucitāptāḷōcanāgrēsarāntaradoḷtā
ne samagramaṁtripeṟa nātharoḷiṁtorvvane jīyabāppenisida śrī
bhīmadaṇḍādhipa . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍa nāyakaṁ . śiṣṭēṣṭajanābhī
ṣṭaphaḷapradāyakaṁ . nuḍidantagaṇḍa . saujanyavanajavanamārttaṇḍaṁ . kāśmīraviṣayamukhamaṇḍanaṁ . svāmivaṁcaka
śiraskhaṁḍanaṁ . śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhṛṁgaṁ nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna sāvāsi
gaḷadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ ṇaṁ daṇḍanāyaka bhīvaṇayyaṁgaḷu palasige pannircchāsiramumaṁ saptārddhalakṣe
yaccu pannāyamuma nāḷuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . Abhimānamēru vitaraṇa vibhūṣaṇaṁ dharmmadharmmarājaṁ ta
vibhavaika prabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktiguṇasaṁpanna . kadanadoḷāntaraṁ tuḷidu kolveḍeyoḷ layakā
neṁbudu jaṁgamakaḷpavṛkṣameṁbudu śaraṇendu bandeḷase kāpiḍeyoḷ dṛḍhavajra
ṇḍaḷi mā . matta nuttamaraṁ paḍedudarkke
budhōttamanaṁ tranaṁ mādhavanadayeyoḷ dharmmadoḷārppinoḷ vi
ḷgāṁbhīryyadoḷ dhairyyadoḷnayadoḷ cārucaritradoḷvinayadoḷcāturyyadoḷ śauryyadoḷniya
tācāradoḷo ḷā vijñānadoḷtāne dharittriyo ḷatyu(ṁ) nnatanāda nūrjjitayaśōla
kṣmīdhavaṁ mādhavaṁ . svasti samastavastuguṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛta mahāmātyapadavīvirājamāna mā
nōnnata prabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasaṁpanna vibudhaprasannaṁ . sukarakavitārasavicāra
cārucaturānanaṁ . madavadarikaripaṁcā[nanaṁ .] bandhujanavanadhiśaratsamayapūrṇnasudhā . karaṁ . saujanyaratnākaraṁ . śrī
madbhavānīnāthapādābjabhṛṁgaṁ . sāhasatuṁgaṁ nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna naccu pannā
yadadhiṣṭhāyaka daṇḍanāyaka mādhavabhaṭṭar beḷvalanāḍoḷagaṇāgrahāraṁ gaḻdugina śrīsvayaṁbhu trikūṭēśvara
sōmanāthadēvargge cāḷukyavikramakālada 27 neya citrabhānu saṁvatsarada caitra śuddha pāḍiva Ādivāradaṁ
du mahāpūjeyaṁ māḍi rggā nāgavāviyalu koysideleya gaḷa kuḷiya suṁkava tamaciya mu
dreya potthadoḷ ke tiṁgaḷigoṁdu gadyāṇaponnumaṁ tammaciya mudreya mūṟuvīsada hattaḍakeya
baḷiya da(ṁ)rśanada 75 Eṟeyaṁ svarūpade lekkaṁ māḍi hattaratāṇada samakaṭṭu paṇaviṁge
hadinēḷu poṁnalu tammā kāṇikeyoḷage lekkaṁmāḍi kuḍuvar . koṭṭa ponnoḷage trikuṭī
śvaradēvarigondu bhāgaṁ maṁnēra gōvindaṇage kēśavadēvara naivēdyakkaṁ satrakka veraḍu bhāgamiṁtī mārggadiṁ
māḍi kuḍutaṁ barppar . śrī svayaṁbhudēvara maṭhadācāryyar . kṣitilōkayka pavitra
mādudu tapaṁ māduda samaṁ pāṇḍi�
māśācaḷabhṛtu ttuyaśaṁ śaśāṁkasadṛśa śrīmatkṛyāśaktipaṁḍitaroṁduṁnata rā
japūjyamenisittī dhāriṇīlōkadoḷ . Enisida kṛyāśaktipaṁḍitadēvara kā
laṁkarcci dēvara naṁdādīvigega maṁgabhōgakkaṁ dēvara sannidhānadoḷ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa rintī śāsanama
ryyādeya dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāge kēdārādi puṇya
tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷsāsirvva rvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge sāsira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ kūḷagumaṁ ponnoḷaṁ pa
cceratnadoḷaṁ kaṭṭisida phaḷamanayduvar . © . yidanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷsāsira kavile
yaṁ kurukṣētradoḷsāsirvva rbrāhmaṇarumaṁ sōmēśvarada leḷkōṭi tapōdhanaruma naḷi
da mahāpātakarappar © .
Digital edition of SII 11.150 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
